polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly ONE paragraph, start with 'Bullish:', 'Bearish:', or 'Mixed:'? Actually start with 'Mixed:' followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

We need to interpret overall market sentiment based on these prediction markets. The data: Fed rates: high probability of no change (93%) vs increase 6% -> suggests expectation of stable rates (bullish for equities? maybe neutral). US invade Iran before 2027: 26% chance (some risk). Mojtaba Khamenei head of state Iran end 2026: 76% (expect leadership continuity). LeBron James to GSW: 13% low. US x Iran Effective Ceasefire by July 24: 10% low. Iran invades Kuwait by Aug 31: 3% very low. Oleksandr Syrskyi out as Ukraine Commander-in-Chief by July 31 2026: 65% chance (expect change). Overall sentiment? Mixed: some bullish signs (stable Fed rates, low chance of Iran invasion, low chance of ceasefire? Actually ceasefire low suggests tension). But also high chance of leadership continuity in Iran (maybe stable). Expect Ukrainian commander change (maybe uncertainty). So overall mixed.
